source:
#Get Parameter from controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "AEMO_Gold"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container "demodata/demo_aemo"
#source_file = '' #CUSTOMER__full_32a72bd2-bd94-467f-9030-6b9f20dad676_20240204_100201

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

#Get Current Date
Gold_LoadDate=spark.sql("select current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0]

#Synapse Dedicated Server detials
SynapseDedicatedServer = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedServer'] 
TempFolder = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['TempFolder']
SynapseDedicatedDatabase = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedDatabase']

# Display values
print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)
print(SynapseDedicatedServer)
print(TempFolder)
print(SynapseDedicatedDatabase)

# Create AEMO Dir if it does not exist
dirs_in_gold =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/")]
if "AEMO" not in dirs_in_gold:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")

# Create NEM12 Dir if it does not exist 
dirs_in_aemo =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")]

if "NEM12" not in dirs_in_aemo:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO/NEM12")
# Table FactMeterUsageData_5min: START

#Set table name
db_tablename="FactMeterUsageData_5min"
source_dbname = "aemo_silver"
source_tablename = "nem12_silver"
msats_source_dbname = "msats_silver"
msats_source_tablename = "report_c4_nmi_data"

# Load 30, 15 and 5 min data into separate data frame
df_gold_30 = spark.sql(f"""SELECT * FROM 
                                    (SELECT
                                        aemo.NMI,
                                        aemo.NMIHashId,
                                        aemo.IntervalLength AS original_IntervalLength,
                                        aemo.NMISuffix,
                                        aemo.Timestamp,
                                        aemo.Usage,
                                        aemo.UnitOfMeasurementId,
                                        aemo.UnitOfMeasurementHashId,
                                        aemo.QualityFlag,
                                        aemo.QualityFlagHashId,
                                        aemo.ReasonCodeId,
                                        aemo.ReasonCodeHashId,
                                        msats.distribution_loss_factor,
                                        msats.tni, 
                                        msats.status,
                                        RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY aemo.nmi, aemo.Timestamp ORDER BY msats.report_status_id DESC) AS MSATSRank
                                    FROM {source_dbname}.{source_tablename} aemo 
                                    LEFT JOIN {msats_source_dbname}.{msats_source_tablename} msats 
                                        ON aemo.nmi = msats.nmi 
                                            AND CAST(aemo.Timestamp AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST(msats.from_date AS DATE) AND CAST(msats.to_date AS DATE)
                                    where aemo.intervallength = 30
                                        and CAST(aemo.Timestamp AS DATE) >= (current_date() - INTERVAL 25 MONTH)
                                        ) TEMP
                        WHERE TEMP.MSATSRank = 1
                    """)

df_gold_15 = spark.sql(f"""SELECT * FROM 
                                    (SELECT
                                        aemo.NMI,
                                        aemo.NMIHashId,
                                        aemo.IntervalLength AS original_IntervalLength,
                                        aemo.NMISuffix,
                                        aemo.Timestamp,
                                        aemo.Usage,
                                        aemo.UnitOfMeasurementId,
                                        aemo.UnitOfMeasurementHashId,
                                        aemo.QualityFlag,
                                        aemo.QualityFlagHashId,
                                        aemo.ReasonCodeId,
                                        aemo.ReasonCodeHashId,
                                        msats.distribution_loss_factor,
                                        msats.tni, 
                                        msats.status,
                                        RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY aemo.nmi, aemo.Timestamp ORDER BY msats.report_status_id DESC) AS MSATSRank
                                    FROM {source_dbname}.{source_tablename} aemo 
                                    LEFT JOIN {msats_source_dbname}.{msats_source_tablename} msats 
                                        ON aemo.nmi = msats.nmi 
                                            AND CAST(aemo.Timestamp AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST(msats.from_date AS DATE) AND CAST(msats.to_date AS DATE)
                                    where aemo.intervallength = 15
                                        and CAST(aemo.Timestamp AS DATE) >= (current_date() - INTERVAL 25 MONTH)
                                        ) TEMP
                        WHERE TEMP.MSATSRank = 1
                    """)

df_gold_5 = spark.sql(f"""SELECT * FROM 
                                    (SELECT
                                        aemo.NMI,
                                        aemo.NMIHashId,
                                        aemo.IntervalLength AS original_IntervalLength,
                                        aemo.NMISuffix,
                                        aemo.Timestamp,
                                        aemo.Usage,
                                        aemo.UnitOfMeasurementId,
                                        aemo.UnitOfMeasurementHashId,
                                        aemo.QualityFlag,
                                        aemo.QualityFlagHashId,
                                        aemo.ReasonCodeId,
                                        aemo.ReasonCodeHashId,
                                        msats.distribution_loss_factor,
                                        msats.tni, 
                                        msats.status,
                                        RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY aemo.nmi, aemo.Timestamp ORDER BY msats.report_status_id DESC) AS MSATSRank
                                    FROM {source_dbname}.{source_tablename} aemo 
                                    LEFT JOIN {msats_source_dbname}.{msats_source_tablename} msats 
                                        ON aemo.nmi = msats.nmi 
                                            AND CAST(aemo.Timestamp AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST(msats.from_date AS DATE) AND CAST(msats.to_date AS DATE)
                                    where aemo.intervallength = 5
                                        and CAST(aemo.Timestamp AS DATE) >= (current_date() - INTERVAL 25 MONTH)
                                        ) TEMP
                        WHERE TEMP.MSATSRank = 1

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

# Initialize Spark session
spark = SparkSession.builder.master("local").appName("Add Index Starting from 1").getOrCreate()

# Define start and end times
start_time = datetime(2025, 1, 1, 0, 0)  # 2025-01-01 00:00:00
end_time = datetime(2025, 1, 1, 23, 55)    # 2025-01-01 01:00:00

# Generate time intervals with 5 minutes increment
time_intervals = []
current_time = start_time
while current_time <= end_time:
    time_intervals.append(current_time)
    current_time += timedelta(minutes=5)

# Convert the list of time intervals into a PySpark DataFrame
time_df = spark.createDataFrame([(t,) for t in time_intervals], ['time'])

# Define a window specification to generate row numbers
window_spec = Window.orderBy("time")

# Add the index column starting from 1
time_df_with_index = time_df.withColumn("new_IntervalIndex", row_number().over(window_spec))
time_df_with_index = time_df_with_index.withColumn("new_TimeId",date_format("time", 'HHmm').cast("integer"))
time_df_with_index = time_df_with_index.withColumn("new_IntervalLength",lit(5))
time_df_with_index = time_df_with_index.withColumn("TimeHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "new_TimeId"), 256))

# Show the result
#display(time_df_with_index)

from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

# Generate an array of times with 5-minute increments for each row
df_with_30 = df_gold_30.withColumn(
    'times_array', 
    array(
        col('Timestamp'),
        expr("Timestamp + INTERVAL 5 MINUTE"),
        expr("Timestamp + INTERVAL 10 MINUTE"),
        expr("Timestamp + INTERVAL 15 MINUTE"),
        expr("Timestamp + INTERVAL 20 MINUTE"),
        expr("Timestamp + INTERVAL 25 MINUTE")
    )
)

df_with_15 = df_gold_15.withColumn(
    'times_array', 
    array(
        col('Timestamp'),
        expr("Timestamp + INTERVAL 5 MINUTE"),
        expr("Timestamp + INTERVAL 10 MINUTE")
    )
)

#display(df_with_30)
#display(df_with_15)

# Explode the array into 5 rows per original row for 30min
expanded_df_30 = df_with_30.select('NMI', 'NMIHashId','original_IntervalLength','NMISuffix','Timestamp','Usage','UnitOfMeasurementId','UnitOfMeasurementHashId','QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId',
                                    'ReasonCodeId','ReasonCodeHashId','distribution_loss_factor','tni','status', explode('times_array').alias('new_time'))
expanded_df_30 = expanded_df_30.withColumn('new_TimeId',date_format('new_time', 'HHmm').cast('integer'))
expanded_df_30 = expanded_df_30.withColumn('new_Usage', col('Usage')/6)
expanded_df_30 = expanded_df_30.withColumn('Suffix',substring('NMISuffix',1,1))

# Explode the array into 5 rows per original row for 15min
expanded_df_15 = df_with_15.select('NMI', 'NMIHashId','original_IntervalLength','NMISuffix','Timestamp','Usage','UnitOfMeasurementId','UnitOfMeasurementHashId','QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId',
                                    'ReasonCodeId','ReasonCodeHashId','distribution_loss_factor','tni','status', explode('times_array').alias('new_time'))
expanded_df_15 = expanded_df_15.withColumn('new_TimeId',date_format('new_time', 'HHmm').cast('integer'))
expanded_df_15 = expanded_df_15.withColumn('new_Usage', col('Usage')/3)
expanded_df_15 = expanded_df_15.withColumn('Suffix',substring('NMISuffix',1,1))

# 5min data 
expanded_df_5 = df_gold_5.select('NMI', 'NMIHashId','original_IntervalLength','NMISuffix','Timestamp','Usage','UnitOfMeasurementId','UnitOfMeasurementHashId','QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId',
                                    'ReasonCodeId','ReasonCodeHashId','distribution_loss_factor','tni','status',col('Timestamp').alias('new_time'))
expanded_df_5 = expanded_df_5.withColumn('new_TimeId',date_format('new_time', 'HHmm').cast('integer'))
expanded_df_5 = expanded_df_5.withColumn('new_Usage', col('Usage'))
expanded_df_5 = expanded_df_5.withColumn('Suffix',substring('NMISuffix',1,1))

#display(expanded_df_30)

# Perform the union
df_union = expanded_df_15.union(expanded_df_30)
df_union = df_union.union(expanded_df_5)

#display(df_union)

from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

# Pivot the 'category' column into separate columns, aggregating by 'id'
expanded_df = df_union.groupBy('NMI','NMIHashId','new_time','QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId','ReasonCodeId','ReasonCodeHashId'
                                ,'new_TimeId','distribution_loss_factor','tni','status').pivot('Suffix').agg(sum('new_Usage'))

# Join for IntervalIndex
expanded_df = expanded_df.join(time_df_with_index, on='new_TimeId', how='inner')

# Replace NULL values in usage
expanded_df = expanded_df.na.fill({'E':0})
expanded_df = expanded_df.na.fill({'B':0})
expanded_df = expanded_df.na.fill({'K':0})
expanded_df = expanded_df.na.fill({'Q':0})


# Calculated fields
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('Net_kWh', col('E')-col('B'))
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('Net_MWh', (col('E')-col('B'))/1000)
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('kW', ((col('E')*6)*2))
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('kVAR', ((col('Q')*6)*2))
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('kVA', sqrt(pow(col('kW'),2)+pow(col('kVAR'),2)))

expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn(
    'Power_Factor', 
    when(col('kVA') == 0, 0)
    .when(col('kW') == 0, 0)
    .otherwise(col('kW')/col('kVA'))
)

expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn(
    'Power_Factor_per', 
    concat(round(col('Power_Factor') * 100, 2).cast('string'), lit('%'))
)

# Add columns
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('end_time', expr("new_time + INTERVAL 5 MINUTE"))

expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('DateId',date_format(col('new_time'), 'yyyyMMdd').cast("integer"))
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('DateHashId', sha2(concat_ws("||", "DateId"), 256))
expanded_df = expanded_df.withColumn('LoadDate', to_timestamp(lit(Gold_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))


# Show the result
#display(expanded_df)

# Select required column
expanded_df_gold = expanded_df.select('NMI', 'NMIHashId',col('new_time').alias('Timestamp'),'DateHashId',col('end_time').alias('DisplayTimestamp_d'),'TimeHashId',col('new_IntervalIndex').alias('Period'),
                                    'QualityFlag','QualityFlagHashId','ReasonCodeId','ReasonCodeHashId',col('distribution_loss_factor').alias('DLF_Code'),col('tni').alias('TLF_Code'),col('status').alias('Status'),
                                    'E','B','K','Q','Net_kWh','Net_MWh','kW','kVAR','kVA','Power_Factor','Power_Factor_per','LoadDate')


# Show the result
#display(expanded_df_gold)

spark.sql(f"""
                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                (
                    NMI STRING,  
                    NMIHashId STRING,    
                    Timestamp TIMESTAMP, 
                    DateHashId STRING,  
                    DisplayTimestamp_d TIMESTAMP, 
                    TimeHashId STRING,
                    Period INT,
                    QualityFlag STRING,
                    QualityFlagHashId STRING,
                    ReasonCodeId STRING,
                    ReasonCodeHashId STRING,
                    DLF_Code STRING,
                    TLF_Code STRING,
                    Status STRING,
                    E DOUBLE,
                    B DOUBLE,
                    K DOUBLE,
                    Q DOUBLE,
                    Net_kWh DOUBLE,
                    Net_MWh DOUBLE,
                    kW DOUBLE,
                    kVAR DOUBLE,
                    kVA DOUBLE,
                    Power_Factor DOUBLE,
                    Power_Factor_per STRING,
                    LoadDate TIMESTAMP
                )
                USING delta
                LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
            """)
# Row count parameters
Gold_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} """).collect()[0][0]

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
expanded_df_gold.createOrReplaceTempView(f"""Gold_{db_tablename}""")

# Use insert operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f""" 
            INSERT INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} 
                            SELECT
                                        NMI,  
                                        NMIHashId,    
                                        Timestamp,
                                        DateHashId,   
                                        DisplayTimestamp_d, 
                                        TimeHashId,
                                        Period,
                                        QualityFlag,
                                        QualityFlagHashId,
                                        ReasonCodeId,
                                        ReasonCodeHashId,
                                        DLF_Code,
                                        TLF_Code,
                                        Status,
                                        E,
                                        B,
                                        K,
                                        Q,
                                        Net_kWh,
                                        Net_MWh,
                                        kW,
                                        kVAR,
                                        kVA,
                                        Power_Factor,
                                        Power_Factor_per,
                                        LoadDate
                            FROM Gold_{db_tablename};

# Create a data frame for dedicated SQL server
df_gold = spark.sql(f"""
                            SELECT
                                        NMI,  
                                        NMIHashId,    
                                        Timestamp,
                                        DateHashId,   
                                        DisplayTimestamp_d, 
                                        TimeHashId,
                                        Period,
                                        QualityFlag,
                                        QualityFlagHashId,
                                        ReasonCodeId,
                                        ReasonCodeHashId,
                                        DLF_Code,
                                        TLF_Code,
                                        Status,
                                        E,
                                        B,
                                        K,
                                        Q,
                                        Net_kWh,
                                        Net_MWh,
                                        kW,
                                        kVAR,
                                        kVA,
                                        Power_Factor,
                                        Power_Factor_per,
                                        LoadDate
                        FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}

column_order = [
                "NMI",  
                "NMIHashId",
                "Timestamp",
                "DateHashId",   
                "DisplayTimestamp_d", 
                "TimeHashId",
                "Period",
                "QualityFlag",
                "QualityFlagHashId",
                "ReasonCodeId",
                "ReasonCodeHashId",
                "DLF_Code",
                "TLF_Code",
                "Status",
                "E",
                "B",
                "K",
                "Q",
                "Net_kWh",
                "Net_MWh",
                "kW",
                "kVAR",
                "kVA",
                "Power_Factor",
                "Power_Factor_per",
                "LoadDate"

# Write using AAD Auth to internal table
# Add required imports
import com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics
from com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics.Constants import Constants
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

#order columns for Azure Synapse insert should match synapse table creation order.
df_gold=df_gold.select(*column_order)

# Configure and submit the request to write to Synapse Dedicated SQL Pool
# Sample below is using AAD-based authentication approach; See further examples to leverage SQL Basic auth.
(df_gold.write
    # If `Constants.SERVER` is not provided, the `<database_name>` from the three-part table name argument
    # to `synapsesql` method is used to infer the Synapse Dedicated SQL End Point.
    .option(Constants.SERVER, f"""{SynapseDedicatedServer}""")
    # Like-wise, if `Constants.TEMP_FOLDER` is not provided, the connector will use the runtime staging directory config (see section on Configuration Options for details).
    .option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, (f"""abfss://temp@{TempFolder}/{db_tablename}"""))
    # Choose a save mode that is apt for your use case.
    # Options for save modes are "error" or "errorifexists" (default), "overwrite", "append", "ignore".
    # refer to https://spark.apache.org/docs/latest/sql-data-sources-load-save-functions.html#save-modes
    .mode("overwrite")
    # Required parameter - Three-part table name to which data will be written
    .synapsesql(f"""{SynapseDedicatedDatabase}.dbo.{db_tablename}"""))
Gold_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
#Row calculation
Gold_TotalRows = Gold_TotalRowCount_Post

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Gold_LoadDate,Gold_TotalRows,0,0,Gold_TotalRows,Gold_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
# Table FactMeterUsageData_5min: END
